Since 2022  ·  Austin, TX

Minivan
Dad

Indie rock with a funky, folksy, psychedelic soul. Guitar, synth, bass, drums, and flavor horns. Formed out of jam sessions in Austin, Texas in 2022. We play local shows regularly — follow @minivandadband on Instagram to find out when and where. Come grab a beer with us!
